quality-compliance.title: Quality & Compliance Policy
quality-compliance.description: Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. Quality & Compliance Policy

content.overview: At Healysense™, exceptional quality is the core value guiding our development and operations. Our Quality Management System (QMS) governs every stage of our product lifecycle, supporting our mission to deliver high-performing, safe, and reliable medical software that healthcare professionals can trust.

sections.title: Regulatory Standards & Certifications We are committed to the highest global standards for medical device safety and compliance:
items: ISO 13485:2016 Certified: Meeting the global standard for medical device quality management systems.
Certified to EU 2017/745 (MDR): CE Marked in accordance with the European Medical Device Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
Standards Adherence: Fully compliant with ISO 14971 (Application of risk management to medical devices) and IEC 62304 (Medical device software – Software life cycle processes).
sections.footer: Our Regulatory Team ensures that all Healysense™ products are properly registered and authorized for marketing in every region where we operate

sections.title: Indications for Use & Safety
items: **Triage and Notification Solutions:** Healysense's triage and notification solutions are designed to assist healthcare professionals by identifying and prioritizing critical cases. These tools are not diagnostic software and are not intended to replace a clinician's full interpretation of a medical image as per the standard of care. Clinical decisions should be made only after evaluating the full original series in the PACS, along with other relevant clinical information.

**Quantification Solutions:** Healysense's quantification solutions assist healthcare professionals by providing automated measurements and quantification of various radiological parameters. These results are not intended for stand-alone clinical decision-making and do not preclude the independent clinical assessment of cases. Clinicians remain responsible for reviewing full images in accordance with the standard of care.

**Support & Resources:** For detailed information on Healysense's cleared products, indications for use, and safe usage instructions, please refer to the Healysense website or the respective Device User Guide. To request a copy of the User Guide, please email support@healysense.ai. For further inquiries regarding quality, regulation, or compliance, please contact us at support@healysense.ai.

information-security.title: Information Security
information-security.description: Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. Information Security Policy

content.overview: The primary objective of the systems established in accordance with the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Management System (ISMS) standard within the scope of Healysense's services is to demonstrate that information security management is effectively ensured across all components, including personnel, infrastructure, software, hardware, customer information, organizational data, all business operations, third-party information, and financial resources; to secure the integrity of quality and risk management; to monitor and evaluate the performance of information and quality security management processes; and to ensure the proper regulation of relationships with third parties concerning matters of quality, information security, and customer satisfaction.

sections.title: In this regard, the objective of our Information Security Management System (ISMS) Policy is to:
items: Protect the information assets of Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. against all types of threats that may arise intentionally or unintentionally, internally or externally; ensure appropriate accessibility to information in alignment with business processes; comply with legal and regulatory requirements; and carry out continuous improvement activities.

Ensure the continuity of the three fundamental components of the Information Security Management System in all operations: Confidentiality (Preventing unauthorized access to critical information), Integrity (Ensuring and demonstrating the accuracy and completeness of information), Availability (Ensuring that authorized individuals can access information whenever necessary).
Leadership and Commitment: The management of our company demonstrates leadership in the establishment and implementation of the ISMS and ensures active participation at the highest level.
Address the security of not only electronically stored data but also all information held in written, printed, verbal, and similar formats.
Provide Information Security Management training to all personnel.
Report all actual or suspected information security vulnerabilities to the ISMS Team and ensure that such incidents are investigated by the team.
Prepare, maintain, and test business continuity plans.
Conduct periodic evaluations in the field of information security to identify existing risks; review and follow up on action plans based on the evaluation results.
Prevent any disputes and conflicts of interest that may arise from contractual obligations.
Fulfill business requirements for accessibility to information and information systems.

terms-of-use.title: Terms of Use
terms-of-use.description: Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. Terms of Use

content.overview: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern access to and use of the website located at www.healysense.ai and its subdomains (the "Website"), operated by Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. ("Healysense", "Company", "we", "us", or "our"). By accessing, browsing, or using the Website, you ("User", "you") acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to be legally bound by these Terms and all applicable laws and regulations of the Republic of Türkiye. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not use the Website.

sections.title: 1. Purpose of the Website
sections.content: The Website is provided for the purpose of:
items: Providing general information about Healysense, its products, services, and activities;
Presenting artificial intelligence–based medical software solutions;
Facilitating communication between Healysense and healthcare professionals, institutions, business partners, and potential customers.
sections.footer: The Website does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility
items: The Website is intended for individuals who are at least 18 years old. By using the Website, you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements under Turkish law.

sections.title: 3. Use of the Website
sections.content: You may use the Website only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to:
items: Use the Website in violation of any applicable law, regulation, or public order;
Copy, reproduce, distribute, modify, or exploit any content without prior written permission from Healysense;
Interfere with or disrupt the security, integrity, or performance of the Website;
Use automated systems (bots, crawlers, scrapers) without authorization;
Attempt unauthorized access to systems, servers, or data.
sections.footer: Healysense reserves the right to suspend or terminate access to the Website at its sole discretion in case of misuse.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property Rights
sections.content: All content on the Website, including but not limited to:
items: Texts, graphics, logos, icons, images, videos,
Software, algorithms, source code,
Trademarks, trade names, and designs,
sections.footer: are the exclusive property of Healysense or its licensors, and are protected under Turkish Intellectual and Artistic Works Law No. 5846, Turkish Industrial Property Law No. 6769, and International intellectual property treaties. No license or right is granted to you except for personal, non-commercial viewing.

sections.title: 5. Medical and Regulatory Disclaimer
sections.content: The information provided on the Website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute:
items: Medical advice,
Diagnosis,
Treatment recommendations.
sections.footer: Healysense's software products are intended to support healthcare professionals, not to replace clinical judgment. Clinical decisions must be made solely by licensed healthcare professionals based on full medical data and professional standards.

sections.title: 6. User Submissions
sections.content: If you submit information, inquiries, or documents through the Website:
items: You represent that the content is accurate and lawful;
You grant Healysense a non-exclusive right to use such content for communication and business purposes;
You acknowledge that submissions are not confidential unless explicitly stated otherwise.
sections.footer: Healysense reserves the right to remove or ignore any submission without notice.

sections.title: 7. Privacy and Personal Data
sections.content: Personal data collected through the Website is processed in accordance with:
items: Turkish Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"),
Healysense's Privacy Policy and Clarification Text.
sections.footer: For detailed information, please review the relevant policies published on the Website.

sections.title: 8. Third-Party Links
items: The Website may contain links to third-party websites. Healysense has no control over such websites and assumes no responsibility for their content, policies, or practices. Access to third-party websites is at your own risk.

sections.title: 9. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: The Website is provided "as is" and "as available". To the maximum extent permitted under Turkish law, Healysense:
items: Makes no warranties regarding accuracy, completeness, or availability;
Does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation;
Disclaims all implied warranties, including merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Healysense shall not be liable for:
items: Direct or indirect damages,
Loss of data, profit, reputation, or business,
Any damages arising from use or inability to use the Website.
sections.footer: Nothing in these Terms excludes liability that cannot be excluded under Turkish law.

sections.title: 11. Indemnification
sections.content: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Healysense, its directors, officers, employees, and affiliates from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from:
items: Your use of the Website;
Violation of these Terms;
Infringement of third-party rights.

sections.title: 12. Amendments
items: Healysense reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Updated Terms become effective upon publication on the Website. Continued use of the Website constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

sections.title: 13. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
items: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Türkiye. Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of Istanbul Anatolian Courts and Enforcement Offices, unless mandatory provisions of law provide otherwise.

sections.title: 14. Contact Information
items: For questions regarding these Terms, please contact: Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. info@healysense.ai

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. Privacy Policy

content.overview: This Privacy Policy explains how Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. ("Healysense", "Company", "we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, stores, transfers, and protects personal data obtained through www.healysense.ai and its subdomains (the "Website"). Healysense processes personal data in accordance with Turkish Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), relevant secondary legislation and decisions of the Personal Data Protection Authority, and where applicable, the EU General Data Protection Regulation ("GDPR").

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
items: In accordance with KVKK, the data controller is: Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş.

sections.title: 2. Personal Data We Collect
sections.content: Depending on your interaction with the Website, we may collect the following categories of personal data:
items: Identity Information: name, surname
Contact Information: email address, phone number, company name
Professional Information: job title, institution, area of expertise
Technical Data: IP address, browser type, device information, access logs
Communication Data: messages, inquiries, feedback sent via forms or email
Marketing Data: preferences regarding communications (if applicable)
sections.footer: Healysense does not intentionally collect sensitive personal data unless explicitly required and permitted by law.

sections.title: 3. Methods of Data Collection
items: Website contact forms,
Email or other electronic communications,
Cookies and similar technologies,
Automatic logging systems during Website access.

sections.title: 4. Purposes of Processing
sections.content: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:
items: To operate, maintain, and improve the Website;
To respond to inquiries, requests, and communications;
To provide information about Healysense's products and services;
To manage business relationships and commercial activities;
To ensure information security and prevent misuse;
To comply with legal obligations;
To protect legal rights and conduct legal processes, if necessary.

sections.title: 5. Legal Grounds for Processing
sections.content: Personal data is processed based on the legal grounds set out in Articles 5 and 6 of KVKK, including:
items: Explicit consent of the data subject (where required);
Necessity for the establishment or performance of a contract;
Fulfillment of legal obligations;
Legitimate interests of Healysense, provided that fundamental rights and freedoms are not harmed.

sections.title: 6. Transfer of Personal Data
sections.content: Personal data may be transferred, in accordance with KVKK and applicable legislation, to:
items: Authorized public institutions and authorities;
Business partners, suppliers, and service providers (e.g. IT, hosting, analytics);
Group companies, if applicable.
sections.footer: Transfers outside Türkiye are conducted only with explicit consent of the data subject, or in accordance with KVKK's rules on cross-border data transfers and adequate safeguards.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention Periods
sections.content: Personal data is retained only for the period required by:
items: The purpose of processing,
Applicable legislation.
sections.footer: Once the purpose expires or legal retention periods end, personal data is deleted, destroyed, or anonymized in accordance with Healysense's Data Retention and Destruction Policy.

sections.title: 8. Data Security Measures
sections.content: Healysense takes appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including but not limited to:
items: Access control and authorization mechanisms;
Secure network and system infrastructure;
Logging and monitoring activities;
Staff confidentiality obligations;
Regular risk assessments and security reviews.

sections.title: 9. Rights of Data Subjects
sections.content: Pursuant to Article 11 of KVKK, data subjects have the right to:
items: Learn whether personal data is processed;
Request information regarding processing;
Learn the purpose of processing and whether data is used accordingly;
Know third parties to whom data is transferred;
Request correction of incomplete or inaccurate data;
Request deletion or destruction of personal data under legal conditions;
Object to processing results against the data subject;
Request compensation for damages arising from unlawful processing.
sections.footer: Requests may be submitted in writing or via email to info@healysense.ai.

sections.title: 10. Cookies
items: The Website uses cookies and similar technologies. Detailed information regarding cookies is provided in Healysense's Cookie Policy, available on the Website.

sections.title: 11. Third-Party Websites
items: The Website may contain links to third-party websites. Healysense is not responsible for the privacy practices or content of such websites.

sections.title: 12. Changes to This Privacy Policy
items: Healysense reserves the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes become effective upon publication on the Website.

sections.title: 13. Contact
items: For any questions or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or personal data processing, please contact: Healysense Bilgi ve Medikal Tek. Araş. Gel. Danış. San. Tic. A.Ş. info@healysense.ai
